intended_use: Clarius Prostate AI is intended for semi-automatic measurements of prostate volume on ultrasound data acquired by the Clarius Ultrasound Scanner (i.e., curvilinear and endo-cavitary scanners). The use
intended_use_full: Clarius Prostate AI is intended for semi-automatic measurements of prostate volume on ultrasound data acquired by the Clarius Ultrasound Scanner (i.e., curvilinear and endo-cavitary scanners). The user shall be a healthcare professional trained and qualified in ultrasound. The user retains the responsibility of confirming the validity of the measurements based on standard practices and clinical judgment. Clarius Prostate AI is intended for use in adult male patients only.
ground_truth: Manual measurements performed by qualified expert ultrasound reviewers (human experts with relevant prostate ultrasound experience); each reviewer was blinded to Clarius Prostate AI output and other reviewers' annotations
other_metrics: ICC (Intraclass Correlation Coefficient) scores: 0.87 for endo-cavitary probes, 0.67 for curvilinear probes; Mean absolute percent error difference between Clarius Prostate AI and expert reviewers: 0.1192 (95% CI 0.0738, 0.1646); Non-inferiority demonstrated with p-value of 1.146e-5 using equivalence margin of 22%
